sections.title: What is an estimate?
sections.body: An estimate is an approximate, non-binding figure you give a customer for work that is not yet fully scoped. It signals likely cost so the client can decide whether to proceed, without locking you into a fixed price. Once the scope is confirmed, an estimate usually becomes a firm quotation or an invoice.

sections.title: Estimate, approve, invoice
sections.body: Paper & Pen connects the estimate to the rest of your sales flow so an approval moves straight into billing.
items: Build an estimate from saved items or from scratch
Note the scope, assumptions and a validity date
Send by WhatsApp or email for online approval
Track status: draft, sent, approved, declined
Convert an approved estimate to a quote, sales order or invoice in one click

sections.title: When to send which?
sections.body: Send an estimate when the work is not fully defined and the price may move, for example a renovation, a custom build or a service with variable hours. Send a quotation when you can commit to a firm price for a set period. Paper & Pen supports both and lets you graduate one into the other.

faqs.a: Yes. Creating, sending and tracking estimates is free forever on Paper & Pen, with no limits.

faqs.q: What is the difference between an estimate and a quotation?
faqs.a: An estimate is an approximate figure that may change once the work is scoped. A quotation is a firm price you commit to for a stated validity period.

faqs.q: Can a client approve an estimate online?
faqs.a: Yes. The estimate carries an approve-online link, and you are notified the moment a client approves so you can convert it.

faqs.q: Can I turn an estimate into an invoice?
faqs.a: Yes. One click converts an approved estimate into a quotation, sales order or invoice, carrying every line and tax across.

faqs.q: Can I add assumptions or notes?
faqs.a: Yes. Add scope notes, assumptions and terms so the client understands what the estimate covers and what could change the final price.

ctaSub: Create a free Paper & Pen workspace and send a professional estimate your client can approve in one tap.
